actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Andy Murray's British Davis Cup team-mate Dan Evans has won the ATP Challenger Tour title in Metz, France.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has died in a fire at his home in Mansfield.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Ipswich have signed Bolton midfielder David Feeney on loan until the end of the season.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A Cumbrian coastal village has become the first in the UK to meet new EU standards for bathing water quality.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 21-year-old man has been arrested on suspicion of murder after a woman's body was found in the sea in Ramsgate.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The convoy of trucks carrying donations for the Ghurkha veterans in Aldershot has been forced to turn back because the trucks are full.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The former Oceana building on Kingsway is still standing, despite a six month demolition project.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Everton have condemned the "unreservedly" after a man was arrested on suspicion of assault following an incident at the home of defender Mason Holgate.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Jeremy Corbyn has been elected as the new leader of the Labour Party.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Judd Trump and Barry Hawkins beat Mark Allen and Joe Swail 4-3 to reach the final of the World Cup of Darts.
